title: URCC THRIFT STORE - 211info
text: UPPER ROGUE COMMUNITY CENTER URCC THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The thrift store provides a resource for clothing, household items, books and games, bedding, and other items donated by community members at a low cost. Also provides clothing vouchers and accepts donations. 22465 Highway 62 Shady Cove, OR 97539 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Thrift Store: Wednesday-Saturday 10am-3pm Clothing Vouchers: Wednesday 9am-1pm Donations: Wednesday-Saturday 10am-2:30pmpm Email (541) 299-8198 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 299-8198 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information. Walk in to main office for clothing voucher. FEES: Varies by item. No-cost for clothing vouchers through emergency assistance. DOCUMENTS: Emergency Assistance Form for clothing vouchers LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Cities of Butte Falls, Prospect, Shady Cove, and Trail TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located behind the Shady Cove City Hall and Library. Services: Clothing Vouchers Donation Drop Off Points Thrift Shops Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - URCC FOOD PANTRY FOOD - WEDNESDAY LUNCHES HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - MEDICAL EQUIPMENT LOANS UTILITIES - ENERGY AND RENT ASSISTANCE FOR UPPER ROGUE COMMUNITIES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. UPPER ROGUE COMMUNITY CENTER
